data.description:
We could not exercise the live model path. Validate the runtime behaviors the
research pass flagged, on a real key, and adjust if needed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Confirm ToolStrategy structured output populates `structured_response` with real tools attached (and the None path)
- [ ] Confirm no `temperature` is sent to claude-opus-4.x (no 400)
- [ ] Verify MCP tool session lifecycle (stateless re-spawn) and a downed server doesn't silently yield no tools
- [ ] Verify Langfuse trace appears and `flush()` prevents loss in the CLI; assess prompt->trace linkage
data.title: Live-runtime validation of the langgraph runner
